The skill-equipped agent (wi_skills) correctly identified the concealed damage 5-day filing window (J1), explicitly addressed the broker-vs-actual-carrier distinction for Exception B (J3), recognized the declared value liability cap and applied cost-benefit logic for Exception C parcels (J4), and prioritized time-sensitive documentation steps with urgency differentiation (J6). The wi_skills run successfully invoked the logistics-exception-management skill and produced a response that correctly applies the Montreal Convention 14-day notification deadline (J1), demands continuous logger data download (J2), advises holding product for independent inspection (J3), differentiates the two CBP hold causes with appropriate risk triage (J4), explains demurrage liability based on root cause rather than simply disputing with the carrier (J5), triggers immediate quality team notification within the 30-minute window (J6), and provides settlement threshold guidance calibrated to the $312,000 claim (J7).
